name: owen-codex
description: Durable workflow and verification toolkit for OpenAI Codex

interface.shortDescription: Workflow and verification toolkit for OpenAI Codex.
interface.longDescription: Plugin = OWX skill/workflow discovery plus plugin-scoped companion metadata for hooks, MCP servers, and apps. Setup = runtime wiring; legacy setup installs native agents/prompts, while plugin setup enables official plugin-scoped hooks, archives stale legacy native agents/prompts, and keeps config, optional AGENTS.md, HUD, and runtime state current.
